The question is asking to determine the total number of register listings from Dover. Since each row represents an individual register listing and the "city or town" column indicates the location of each listing, we need to group by the "city or town" column to count how many listings are from Dover. The number of register listings from Dover is 17. This is indicated in Group 1 of the grouped data, where "dover" has a count of 17 listings.
